meta.feature_name: Short description of feature (e.g., sessions pause/resume)

requirements: All helpers and orchestrator functions must be injected, not imported directly.
No mocks, stubs, or fake data sources in production.
Each dep must reference an existing real function in server.ts or imported modules.
Routers import types only for DI shape; concrete implementations are provided via server.ts.
DI object constructed and passed explicitly via mount function.

mounting.instruction: Mount new router via mount<Domain>Routes(app, deps) in src/server.ts after similar domain mounts.
validation: grep to confirm no duplicate routes remain
ensure same middleware order and feature flags

requirements: Test all happy and error paths (200, 400, 404, 409, 500).
Assert response payloads and dependency call arguments.
Preserve status codes, payload shapes, log messages, and async sequence exactly.
Match side effects order (e.g., abort → interrupt → manifest update).
Document any justified deviations in discovery_note.md.

rules: Return standardized problem responses (respondWithProblem) or preserve existing legacy envelope where tests require.
No magic numbers or inline constants.
All code fully typed (no 'any', no type assertions).
No test-only branches that alter production behavior.
No LLM provider mocks or test utilities in production code.

requirements: Update .automation/phase21_discovery_note.md with DI surface, mount point, validation results.
Update modular_extraction_contract.json with new domain metadata.
Commit summary: '✅ [SliceID] extraction complete – DI verified, tests green.'

completion_criteria: All gates green (lint, typecheck, test, build, SBOM, provenance).
No warnings or TODOs in CI logs.
